elements.alt: Emergency Management NC DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY logo

Map of North Carolina showing the April 9, 2024 NCEM Status for LiDAR data. The map is color-coded by county to indicate the status: Reprojected from UTM meter to State Plane feet (pink), DEMs in Que (green), DEMs Processing (3, 5, 10, 20, 50ft) (light blue), and DEMs Created (3, 10, & 20ft Tiled) (dark blue).

content.text:
NC Hurricane Florence
2020 NOAA Topo / Bathy and USGS LiDAR 8ppsm
Collected in the Dec 2019 to Feb 2020 time frame

* This data is not yet available on NC Spatial Data Download
** DEMs are being processed as 3, 5, 10, 20, and 50ft cell
    hydro-flattened countywide mosaics. The 3, 5, and 20ft DEM mosaics
    will be tiled to the NC 100 scale GRID

sections.title: NC Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) Elevation Data

elements.alt: Emergency Management NC DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY logo

Map titled 'North Carolina LiDAR Quality Level By Phase'. The map shows different phases of LiDAR collection across the state, color-coded: Phase 1 (2020) - QL 1 (red), Phase 2 (2020) - QL 1 (blue), Phase 3 (2015) - QL 2 (green), Phase 4 (2016) - QL 1 (purple), Phase 5 (2017) - QL 1 (yellow). A callout over the Phase 3 area says 'QL 1 data collection planned for early 2024'.

content.text:
Data collection has been 
completed in Phase 3

elements.alt: Emergency Management NC DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY logo

content.text:
LIDAR data collection will be performed during leaf-off conditions (January – March). The estimated
